title: Ghost Powers
description: Have you ever saw that Minecraft is not full of ghosts? well, with this mod, you can have the same powers that ghosts do!
body:
Have you ever saw that Minecraft is not full of ghosts? well, with this mod, you can have the same powers that ghosts do, Boo!

**FAQ:**

Why is the first version 1.4.2?

**1.4.2 is the first version of the mod that was released in Modrinth, before that, i had tested the mod.**

What does the Teleportation item do?

**Simple. by setting the position to where the player is looking at, we can achieve a teleportation-like effect.**

How did you achieve phasing through walls using the Flight Item?

**I wrote 3 mixins that fool the system into thinking you have Spectator mode, but you actually don't. you need the Flight item to activate it.**

If i have the Flight item, how do i activate/deactivate it?

**Simple. right click the item.**

Where's the demostrations for some of the items?

**At the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/ghost-powers/gallery).**

Are the powers craftable?

**Yes! you can craft them, although these powers are for the endgame or midgame.**
